title: centaurea pseudoscabiosa
intro: Centaurea pseudoscabiosa, also known as False Scabiosa or Balkan Scabious, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. Centaurea pseudoscabiosa is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
